title: Add "Inbox" to mobile app menu bar
excerpt: Is it possible to add the “Inbox” button on the bottom menu bar of the mobile app? In a mobile environment it is really important to have quick access to Notifications and Inbox, like the top right buttons on the desktop…

posts.author: mbadi (Michele)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to add the “Inbox” button on the bottom menu bar of the mobile app? In a mobile environment it is really important to have quick access to Notifications and Inbox, like the top right buttons on the desktop version. Now, in the app, to access the inbox we need to go to “More” and then click on “Inbox” on the top of that page. A direct button on the menu bar will improve the usability.
